dj_text: Goofy mode ON! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! That was Intensiv. Next up, something completely different — just kidding, it's Vi Ved Besked.
commercial_text: Looking for love? Try That Pirate Bot DJ Mingle — the dating app where everyone is either a bot or emotionally unavailab

recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Vi Ved Besked
